chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1063 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.3934/2022 3. For hearing of main case 06-09-2023 Petitioner Nasim-ul Ghani in person Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondents No.2,3,4 & 5 Mrs. Rizwana Memon, Advocate for Respondents No.7 & 8 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro,J:- Petitioner, basically as Assistant Professor in Shah Abdul Latif University Khairpur, has filed this petition for promotion and release of annual increment plus associated benefits. He has submitted that meanwhile he has been selected as Associate Professor in Government College University Hyderabad but the respondent University is not issuing Last Pay Certificate, relieving order as well as the outstanding amount accrued on account of increment and associated benefits. Learned counsel appearing for University undertakes that within one week the LPC and relieving order would be issued to the petitioner facilitating to him to regularize/legalize his service at Government College University. However, the differential amount on account of annual increment would be counted accordingly and would be paid to the petitioner in two weeks. Petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. After two weeks the compliance report shall be submitted in court for perusal in chamber. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
